address.Address: Sector 3, Vasundhara, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh 201012, India

address.streetAddress: Sector 3, Vasundhara, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh 201012, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
The school's rundown building and neglected classrooms create an uncomfortable learning environment, subjecting students to harsh weather conditions. Shockingly, there's no effort to address insect issues, putting students' health at risk.

Raising concerns with the management is futile; their arrogance and blame-shifting are disheartening. The school's imposition of unreasonable rules, like making parents wait outside in extreme weather, only adds to the frustration. Overall, They prioritizes their ego over students' well-being and quality education. Avoid at all costs.

Excellent work experience.. It is an extremely great school, providing quality education and practical learning. The faculty is amazing and so experienced. Extremely happy with the kind of activities organised in school for children's physical, social and intellectual development. Also management continuously work for the enrichment of the staff. It's a great work place. I am enjoying teaching here and also enhancing my knowledge.
Best school in this area I can say..my daughter is also studying there teacher's are very good they believe in overall performance of your ward.

The school has the best infrastructure that suits the needs of the students.  Talking about education school follows the holistic development of the child. The teachers are very cooperative. The school also takes part in various competitions and co-curricular activities. The students are disciplined. Teachers use different teaching methods and activities to make students understand the topic and also help them out. It is one of the best schools in Vasundhara Ghaziabad.

Third class education quality. Now it has degraded a lot after Management has taken interest in money making and making new vague and non-sense rules , also seems teachers are following the same routine by supporting careless management..
Cons:
- Old non- maintained building
- classrooms in very bad shape, students have to suffer in heat, rain or winters.
- No mosquito /insect repellent or fogging.
- When you would raise these issues, Arrogant management don't take notion/acknowledge but blame you in return or ignore the question 😔
- Making absurd rules which even break the constitutional rights of citizens like
- Making parents wait outside in heat or rain
- Parents are not allowed to go even near reception in casual dress like 3/4th pants (what rubbish how you can judge or stop the person based on attire that too is normal after COVID times.) although when taking child's admission they allow you in anything to make money at first.
- No one acknowledge the complaint or issues and never comes out to discuss anything in person. Just calls poor security guard to tell that they cant allow to get anyone inside or get anyone talk. Poor security guard don't even get proper response or answers for queries asked by parents.
- No traffic or parking management.. even management or teachers flaunt the rules like anything..
- Your child is not secure even inside the building as many times neither the staff or CCTV are available to support kid when in need.
- Teachers forgets to give books back in time, or give to other children but when your ward requires , it will not be available and they don't even take responsibility and yes will not support in getting work done for the new notebook.
- Depending on their mood, Projects are allowed/not allowed to be returned with students after review. For once they say yes you will get it back, and then in a week the stance will change.
- Whole front gets floody in rain and footpath is encroached by staff parking.
-And yes, just like Banks they will charge late fees too and may harass on not paying in some other way.

I can write whole book on cons now but last but not least to note, let your child NOT go through the pain here.
